description: Mexican criminal organization originating in Jalisco, formed in 2017 as a split from the Jalisco New Generation Cartel (CJNG). Led by Enrique Sánchez Martínez 'El Cholo', Emiliano Santiago Sánchez 'El M menor Mogli', and Érick Valencia Salazar 'El 85'. It operates in the Guadalajara metropolitan area and is financed by the Sinaloa Cartel. The group is engaged in a violent territorial dispute with CJNG.
